mapper.select: SELECT CAST(alarm_priority AS CHAR) AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM video_device_alarm WHERE deleted = 0 AND alarm_time >= #{startTime} AND alarm_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY alarm_priority ORDER BY alarm_priority

SELECT device_identification AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM video_device_alarm WHERE deleted = 0 AND alarm_time >= #{startTime} AND alarm_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY device_identification ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(alarm_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM video_device_alarm WHERE deleted = 0 AND alarm_time >= #{startTime} AND alarm_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(alarm_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY name
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM video_device_alarm WHERE deleted = 0 AND handle_status = 0
